title: elatostema umbellatum
intro: Elatostema umbellatum, also known as umbrella crevice creeper, is a species of flowering plant in the nettle family, native to the tropical forests of Asia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds and skin conditions. Elatostema umbellatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional remedies and supplements.
